name: Apple- Peanut Butter Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup finely chopped unpared red apple
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly spread each slice of bread with butter.
2. In a small bowl, combine the peanut butter and applesauce; mix until smooth. Stir in the chopped apple and crumbled bacon.
3. Spread 4 slices of bread with the filling mixture. Place lettuce on top of the filling. Cover with the remaining slices of bread to form 4 sandwiches.
